_comment: DIBS Beauty '5 products that replaced my whole makeup bag' creator-pip-listicle — THE WORKED EXAMPLE. Copy to config.json and edit. A ~46s 9:16 (1080x1920, 30fps) AI-creator talking-head PRODUCT LISTICLE with NATIVE Seedance audio: an AI creator counts down 5 DIBS products, and every product beat is a TWO-SHOT micro-cut (creator + real-brand UGC picture-in-picture top-right + product card bottom ~60% -> full-frame Ken-Burns product cutaway + card ~40%). Voice + lips are generated TOGETHER in one Seedance take per beat (no separate VO, no lip-sync bolt-on); DIBS-pink 2-word captions burned LAST. Pipeline: (1) lock the conversational beat script -> native-beats.json; (2) lock the creator anchor (gpt-image-2 iPhone-candid, realism-gated); (3) one native Seedance clip per beat (generate_audio=ON, SAME seed); (4) FREE Ken-Burns product macros + product cards; (5) FREE 2-shot multicut composite (PiP + card + rank badge, native audio continuous); (6) FREE stitch + ~$1 caption burn. Master 1080x1920 h264+aac, ~46s. See scripts/PIPELINE.md for the source scripts.
campaign: 5 products that replaced my whole makeup bag
title: 5 products that replaced my whole makeup bag

listicle.hook_pattern: N products that replaced my whole [X]

beats.name: 00-hook
beats.dialogue: Okay — five products that genuinely replaced my whole makeup bag.

beats.name: 01-did
beats.dialogue: First, the Desert Island Duo. Blush and bronzer in one stick, I just swipe it on with my fingers.

beats.name: 02-lovebeam
beats.dialogue: Then the LoveBeam Perfector. I'm obsessed — it's primer, highlight, and skincare in one.

beats.name: 03-status
beats.dialogue: The Status Stick on your collarbones gives this lit-from-within glow that's never greasy.

beats.name: 04-glowtour
beats.dialogue: Glow Tour Duo is blush and contour together — two swipes and my face looks snatched.

beats.name: 05-no-pressure
beats.dialogue: And the No Pressure liner with the Go-To balm stays put through everything.

beats.name: 06-cta
beats.dialogue: Fewer products, better face. You're welcome.

_note_beats: duration = clamp(ceil(words / 2.3) + 1, 4, 11) s (Seedance native pace ~2.3 words/s). Hook + CTA carry no PiP/card/badge; the 5 product beats each carry a PiP slug + a card slug + a rank badge (2..6). Status Stick (03) has no clean e-comm photo -> its b-roll + card fall back to a branded PIL text card, not an AI product render.

creator._comment: ONE creator anchor, locked once and threaded (with the SAME Seedance seed) into every native clip so the face holds. gpt-image-2 iPhone-candid, gated on realism.
creator.realism: candid iPhone selfie — visible pores, natural matte skin, no gloss/retouch, soft window light, unposed documentary framing. AVOID 'beautiful/perfect/8k/hyperreal'.
creator.descriptor: Woman ~27, warm medium skin, soft natural makeup, casual at-home top, relaxed friendly delivery to camera.

clip_engine._comment: ONE Seedance 2.0 reference-to-video call PER BEAT with generate_audio=ON — voice + lips generated TOGETHER (no separate VO, no lip-sync bolt-on). Dialogue INLINE in the prompt. SAME seed across beats off the creator anchor. Driver: create-hand-swipe-flavor-listicle .../scripts/gen_seedance_native.py.

pip._comment: The brand's REAL existing UGC ad, one per product beat, played picture-in-picture top-right with a hairline white border and audio MUTED (the creator beat's native audio is the only voice). NEVER AI-regenerated. Source: source/pip-candidates/pip-<slug>.mp4.

broll._comment: FREE full-frame product cutaway (shot b of each product beat). Ken-Burns push-in on the REAL DIBS product photo on a soft pink/cream gradient canvas — never an AI product render (i2v mangles labels). Status Stick has no clean photo -> branded PIL text card fallback. Script: working/scripts/broll_kenburns.py.
broll.fallback: branded PIL text card when a product has no clean e-comm photo (e.g. Status Stick)

product_cards._comment: FREE bottom-pinned card PNG (accent stripe + thumbnail + name + subtitle in DIBS type), from the real product photo (or a brand-pink 'dibs.' tile if no photo). Script: working/scripts/render_product_cards.py.
product_cards.no_photo_fallback: brand-pink tile with 'dibs.' wordmark in place of the thumbnail

title_pill._comment: OPT-IN per beat via beats[].show_title. A persistent DIBS text bar rendered once as a PNG at top-center. Default OFF on new projects (an always-on pill was rejected as ugly); the DIBS run had it ON on the body beats.

rank_badge._comment: A counting rank/view-count badge on the PiP on product beats (badge 2..6 in the DIBS run).

composite._comment: FREE multicut: each product beat = 2 shots (creator+PiP+card ~60% -> full-frame Ken-Burns cutaway+card ~40%). Hook front-loads a ~1.6s swipe macro (working/broll/broll-hook-swipe.mp4); CTA is one creator shot. Overlays (PiP top-right + hairline, product card bottom, title pill, rank badge) burned in; the creator beat's NATIVE audio muxed continuous under both shots; PiP audio muted. Script: working/scripts/composite_native_multicut.py.

stitch._comment: FREE. Concat the per-beat composites @ 30fps / yuv420p -> the pre-caption master.

captions._comment: Burned LAST (~$1). White 2-ish-word chunks in the lower third with the DIBS-pink accent, from the native audio's word timings — the on-screen safety net for brand tokens Seedance may mis-voice.

native_audio.note: the Seedance take's native voice IS the bed (no separate VO); PiP audio muted; creator beat audio continuous under both shots

captions.note: white 2-ish-word chunks, lower-third, DIBS-pink accent, from the native audio word timings, burned LAST

title_pill.note: persistent DIBS text bar on the body beats; opt-in per beat via show_title (default OFF on new projects)

rank_badge.note: counting rank badge (2..6) on the PiP on product beats
